ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Combined date and time of the data collection */,
  "air_temp" INTEGER /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_pt_temp" INTEGER /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "sea_lvl_pressure" INTEGER /* Sea level pressure in millibars */,
  "wind_dirc" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_spd" INTEGER /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "sky_con" INTEGER /* Sky condition (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "l_precip_1" INTEGER /* Last 1 hour precipitation in millimeters */,
  "l_precip_6" INTEGER /* Last 6 hours precipitation in millimeters */,
  "precipitation_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of precipitation (foreign key to `precipitation_types`) */,
  "sky_condition_id" INTEGER /* Sky condition (foreign key to `sky_conditions`) */,
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Wind direction (foreign key to `wind_directions`) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_sky_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("sky_condition_id") REFERENCES sky_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wind_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_direction_id") REFERENCES wind_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_precipitation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("precipitation_type_id") REFERENCES precipitation_types ("precipitation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement for the weather type (foreign key to `units`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., degrees Celsius, millibars) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_types" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation type */,
  "precipitation_name" TEXT /* Name of the precipitation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the precipitation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sky_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sky condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the sky condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sky condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was validated */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that performed the validation (foreign key to `users`) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
